name: Lovinia Mak
role: Founder · Clarity Awareness Cognitive Architecture Systems
pullQuote: Simple is not the same thing as easy.
paragraphs: Build fast, learn faster — but the foundational structure must be there for anything to be sustainable long-term and worthy of trust.

Lovinia Mak was the founder of ESL.Connection. She has a Level 7 graduate diploma in teaching. She taught levelled-reading and writing for K–12 and Workplace English for adults. She also developed O.L.I.V.E (Online Learning Integrated Virtual Environment) on Moodle.
Separately, she created English Through Art, a Reggio-Emilia inspired right-brain approach that lowers the affect barrier for children in second language learning.

Lovinia is also the founder of Clarity Awareness Coaching — now Clarity Awareness Cognitive Architecture Systems. CAC focuses on the intersections that cause the experience of 'feeling stuck' in a transformation, in communication, or in sales. Lovinia is a certified practitioner of EFT (Emotional Freedom Technique) and incorporates EFT in private coaching and consultative work.

Prior to teaching, Lovinia was in Advertising, Market Research, Sales, Corporate Communications, and Content Editing — having worked with companies including AC Nielsen Media, Market Behaviour London, Technology Park Malaysia, and Asia E-Golf (a subsidiary of IREKA).
Lovinia's first non-fiction book, The Structureless Potential, is scheduled to be published in 2026.
credentials: Founder, Clarity Awareness Cognitive Architecture Systems
Principal Trainer, Sales For Technical And Non-Sales Professionals

Creator, Emotional Freedom Technique for the 5 Hidden Blocks in Sales
